command.name: Command
command.description: Allows you to define an event for a command string.

outputs.name: Command Triggered
outputs.description: When the command is triggered

outputs.name: Command
outputs.description: The information passed with the command

command.title: Command
command.description: The command string to use for this event.

blockbroken.name: Block Broken
blockbroken.description: Triggered when a block is broken.

outputs.name: Block Broken
outputs.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to get the block at the specified position.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who broke the block.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The information about the block that was broken.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the block that was broken.

blockplaced.name: Block Placed
blockplaced.description: Triggered when a block is placed.

outputs.name: Block Placed
outputs.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to get the block at the specified position.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who placed the block.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The information about the block that was placed.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the block that was placed.

leftclick.name: Left Click
leftclick.description: Triggered when a player left clicks in the world, even if they do not hit a block.

outputs.name: Left Click
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player left clicks in the world.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who performed the left click.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The clicked block, or empty if the click hit air.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The clicked block position, or empty if the click hit air.

rightclick.name: Right Click
rightclick.description: Triggered when a player right clicks in the world, even if they do not hit a block.

outputs.name: Right Click
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player right clicks in the world.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who performed the right click.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The clicked block, or empty if the click hit air.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The clicked block position, or empty if the click hit air.

buttonpressed.name: Button Pressed
buttonpressed.description: Triggered when a player presses a button in the world.

outputs.name: Button Pressed
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player presses a button.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who pressed the button.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The button block that was pressed.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the button that was pressed.

levertoggled.name: Lever Toggled
levertoggled.description: Triggered when a player toggles a lever in the world.

outputs.name: Lever Toggled
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player toggles a lever.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who toggled the lever.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The lever block that was toggled.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the lever that was toggled.

outputs.name: Is On
outputs.description: Whether the lever was toggled on after the interaction.

pressureplatesteppedon.name: Pressure Plate Stepped On
pressureplatesteppedon.description: Triggered when a player steps onto a pressure plate in the world.

outputs.name: Pressure Plate Stepped On
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player steps onto a pressure plate.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who stepped onto the pressure plate.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The pressure plate block that was stepped on.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the pressure plate that was stepped on.

pressureplatesteppedoff.name: Pressure Plate Stepped Off
pressureplatesteppedoff.description: Triggered when a player steps off a pressure plate in the world.

outputs.name: Pressure Plate Stepped Off
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player steps off a pressure plate.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who stepped off the pressure plate.

outputs.name: Block
outputs.description: The pressure plate block that was stepped off.

outputs.name: Position
outputs.description: The position of the pressure plate that was stepped off.

update1tick.name: Update 1 Tick
update1tick.description: Triggered every tick (20 times per second).

outputs.name: Update 1 Tick
outputs.description: The execution output triggered every tick.

outputs.name: Delta Time
outputs.description: The elapsed time in seconds since this event last executed for the current instance. On the first execution, this defaults to 0.05 seconds.

outputs.name: Update 20 Ticks
outputs.description: The execution output triggered every 20 ticks.

outputs.name: Delta Time
outputs.description: The elapsed time in seconds since this event last executed for the current instance. On the first execution, this defaults to 1.0 seconds.

playerjoin.name: Player Join
playerjoin.description: Triggered when a player joins the game.

outputs.name: Player Joined
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player joins.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who joined the game.

playerleave.name: Player Leave
playerleave.description: Triggered when a player leaves the game.

outputs.name: Player Left
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a player leaves.

outputs.name: Player
outputs.description: The player who left the game.

worldloaded.name: World Loaded
worldloaded.description: Triggered once after a world instance finishes loading and its circuits runtime is ready.

outputs.name: World Loaded
outputs.description: The execution output triggered once after the world instance finishes loading.

outputs.name: Load Time
outputs.description: The time in seconds it took for the world instance and its circuits runtime to finish loading.

mobspawned.name: Mob Spawned
mobspawned.description: Triggered when a mob spawns in the world.

outputs.name: Mob Spawned
outputs.description: The execution output triggered when a mob spawns.

outputs.name: Mob
outputs.description: The mob entity that was spawned.
